"use client" import { useState } from "react" import type { Selection } from "react-aria-components" import { Description } from "@/components/ui/field" import { Tag, TagGroup, TagList } from "@/components/ui/tag-group" const fruitList = [ { id: "1", name: "Apple", available: false }, { id: "2", name: "Banana", available: true }, { id: "3", name: "Cherry", available: true }, { id: "4", name: "Date", available: false }, ] export default function TagGroupControlledDemo() { const [selected, setSelected] = useState(new Set([])) return (
{(item) => {item.name}} You have selected: {Array.from(selected).join(", ")}
) }
